summary:
The standard technique is underused owing to its potential for inaccurate results and inability to precisely shape root canals or remove side branches efficiently compared to more advanced methods. Agent2 highlights critical issues with simplicity and speed versus accuracy and efficacy as primary factors limiting widespread adoption of this method. ```plaintext
The standard technique is less commonly used due to concerns aboutaccuracy and effectiveness in fully shaping roots and eliminating lateral canals.
```
